# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses merge request title and description in build notifications and commit messages. This helps track which features are being deployed and generates automatic release notes. Include the MR title in deployment tags.
# Category: cicd_security

variables:
  GIT_DEPTH: "0"

stages:
  - prepare
  - build
  - deploy
  - release

default:
  image: alpine:3.20
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache git curl jq bash

prepare_mr_metadata:
  stage: prepare
  script:
    - |
      if [ -n "$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID" ]; then
        MR_API_URL="$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests/$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID"
        MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$MR_API_URL")"
        MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // ""')"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // ""')"
      elif [ -n "$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH" ]; then
        MR_API_URL="$CI_API_V4_URL/projects/$CI_PROJECT_ID/merge_requests?state=merged&source_branch=$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME&target_branch=$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH&order_by=updated_at&sort=desc&per_page=1"
        MR_JSON="$(curl --silent --header "JOB-TOKEN: $CI_JOB_TOKEN" "$MR_API_URL" | jq '.[0] // {}')"
        MR_TITLE="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.title // ""')"
        MR_DESCRIPTION="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.description // ""')"
        MR_IID="$(echo "$MR_JSON" | jq -r '.iid // ""')"
      fi
    - |
      {
        echo "MR_TITLE<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_DESCRIPTION<<EOF"
        printf '%s\n' "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
        echo "EOF"
        echo "MR_IID=${MR_IID:-$CI_MERGE_REQUEST_IID}"
        echo "DEPLOY_TAG=${CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG}-mr-${MR_IID:-na}-$(printf '%s' "${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/-\+/-/g' | sed 's/^-//;s/-$//' | cut -c1-40)"
      } > mr.env
  artifacts:
    reports:
      dotenv: mr.env
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE'

build_with_mr_context:
  stage: build
  needs: ["prepare_mr_metadata"]
  script:
    - git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git config user.email "ci@$CI_SERVER_HOST"
    - |
      BUILD_MSG="build: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
      if [ -n "${MR_IID:-}" ]; then
        BUILD_MSG="$BUILD_MSG (MR !${MR_IID})"
      fi
      git commit --allow-empty -m "$BUILD_MSG" -m "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
    - |
      printf '%s\n' "Build notification"
      printf '%s\n' "Project: $CI_PROJECT_PATH"
      printf '%s\n' "Commit: $CI_COMMIT_SHA"
      printf '%s\n' "MR Title: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
      printf '%s\n' "MR Description:"
      printf '%s\n' "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
    - mkdir -p dist
    - printf '%s\n' "artifact built for ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}" > dist/build.txt
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE'

deploy_with_mr_tag:
  stage: deploy
  needs: ["prepare_mr_metadata", "build_with_mr_context"]
  script:
    - |
      printf '%s\n' "Deploy notification"
      printf '%s\n' "Environment: production"
      printf '%s\n' "Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
      printf '%s\n' "MR Title: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
      printf '%s\n' "MR Description:"
      printf '%s\n' "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
    - git config user.name "GitLab CI"
    - git config user.email "ci@$CI_SERVER_HOST"
    - git tag -a "${DEPLOY_TAG}" -m "deploy: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}" -m "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
    - git push origin "${DEPLOY_TAG}"
  environment:
    name: production
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'

release_notes:
  stage: release
  needs: ["prepare_mr_metadata", "deploy_with_mr_tag"]
  script:
    - |
      {
        echo "# Release Notes"
        echo
        echo "- Deployment Tag: ${DEPLOY_TAG}"
        echo "- Merge Request: !${MR_IID:-N/A}"
        echo "- Title: ${MR_TITLE:-$CI_COMMIT_TITLE}"
        echo
        echo "## Description"
        printf '%s\n' "${MR_DESCRIPTION:-$CI_COMMIT_MESSAGE}"
      } > release_notes.md
    - cat release_notes.md
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - release_notes.md
  rules:
    - if: '$CI_COMMIT_BRANCH == $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH'
